title.en: DOMESTIC STOVES OR RANGES  (exclusively for solid fuels F24B); DETAILS OF DOMESTIC STOVES OR RANGES, OF GENERAL APPLICATION

Stoves or ranges in which the fuel or energy supply is not restricted to solid fuel or to a type covered by a single one of the following groups F24C3/00 - F24C9/00; Stoves or ranges in which the type of fuel or energy supply is not specified
adapted for the use of two or more kinds of fuel or energy supply (combinations of two or more stoves or ranges each having a different kind of fuel or energy supply F24C11/00)
solely adapted for radiation heating
Radiation heating stoves and ranges, with additional provision for convection heating
with special adaptation for travelling, e.g. collapsible
Stoves or ranges for gaseous fuels (stoves or ranges specially adapted for the use of two or more kinds of fuel or energy supply F24C1/02)
{Stoves}
{Ranges}
with heat produced solely by flame
with heat produced wholly or partly by a radiant body, e.g. by a perforated plate
Arrangement or mounting of burners
Arrangement or mounting of ignition devices
Arrangement or mounting of control or safety devices
with special adaptation for travelling, e.g. collapsible
Stoves or ranges for liquid fuels (stoves or ranges specially adapted for the use of two or more kinds of fuel or energy supply F24C1/02)
with evaporation burners, e.g. dish type
with atomising burners
Arrangement or mounting of burners
Arrangement or mounting of ignition devices
Arrangement or mounting of control or safety devices
Liquid-fuel supply arrangements forming parts of stoves or ranges
with special adaptation for travelling, e.g. collapsible
Stoves or ranges heated by electric energy (stoves or ranges specially adapted for the use of two or more kinds of fuel or energy supply F24C1/02)
{Stoves (F24C7/02 - F24C7/10 take precedence)}
{using electrically heated liquids}
using microwaves
with heat radiated directly from the heating element
Arrangement or mounting of electric heating elements
Arrangement or mounting of control or safety devices
with special adaptation for travelling, e.g. collapsible
Stoves or ranges heated by a single type of energy supply not covered by groups F24C3/00 - F24C7/00 or subclass F24B (solar heat collectors for heating objects, e.g. solar cookers F24S20/30)
Combinations of two or more stoves or ranges, e.g. each having a different kind of energy supply
Stoves or ranges with additional provisions for heating water
Stoves or ranges having self-cleaning provisions, e.g. continuous catalytic cleaning or electrostatic cleaning
{using a cleaning liquid}
pyrolytic type
Details
{arrangements for discharging combustion gases}
{moisturising of air}
{Windows not in a door}
{Coatings for ovens}
{Arrangements for circulation of cooling air}
{Removable panels}
{Illumination for oven cavities}
Doors specially adapted for stoves or ranges
Ornamental features, e.g. grate fronts or surrounds
Foundations or supports plates; Legs or pillars; Casings; Wheels (tops, e.g. hot plates F24C15/10)
Tops, e.g. hot plates; Rings (cover lids or splash guards F24C15/12; spillage trays or grooves F24C15/14)
Side rests; Side plates; Cover lids; Splash guards; Racks outside ovens, e.g. for drying plates
Spillage trays or grooves
Shelves, racks or trays inside ovens; Supports therefor
Arrangement of compartments additional to cooking compartments, e.g. for warming or for storing utensils or fuel containers; Arrangement of additional heating or cooking apparatus, e.g. grills
Removing cooking fumes (parts, details or accessories of cooking-vessels for withdrawing or condensing cooking vapours from such vessels A47J36/38)
Reflectors for radiation heaters
Radiant bodies or panels for radiation heaters (gas burners for producing infrared radiation F23D14/12)
Handles for carrying
Draught shields
Arrangements for mounting stoves or ranges in particular locations
Arrangements of ducts for hot gases, e.g. in or around baking ovens
Elements and arrangements for heat storage or insulation
Protective guards, e.g. for preventing access to heated parts
